data.title: Data: Binance's own funds in the past three months have only seen significant growth in BTC and stablecoins
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of Ai Yi, an analyst on the chain, based on the May reserve report updated by Binance today, the changes in its own funds over the past three months are analyzed: BTC: increased by 9729 (US$963,171,000) ETH: increased by 8033 (US$15,262,700) USDT: increased by 324,667,715 BNB: increased by 15913 (US$9,706,930) SOL: decreased by 2453 (US$367,950) XRP: decreased by 14,501,682 (US$31,613,666) USDC: increased by 1,696,637,283 Except for BTC and stablecoins, the reserves of other assets have hardly increased or even decreased. Although ETH and BNB have increased, the reserves of other assets have increased. The holdings increased by nearly 10 million US dollars, but Binance's spot fees are charged according to the trading currency, and its actual holdings are still decreasing.

data.title: EF announces funding allocation for Q1 2025: Approximately $32.65 million allocated to promote ecology and technology
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Ethereum Foundation released its funding allocation for the first quarter of 2025 on its official blog, allocating approximately US$32.65 million to support the progress of projects such as community and education, consensus layer, zero-knowledge proof, developer tools and execution layer to advance the Ethereum ecosystem and its technological evolution.

data.title: China likely to record a dip in April exports due to US tariffs
data.description:
Exports of products made in inland China, a long-term pillar of its post-pandemic recovery, appear to be sputtering under the weight of renewed US tariffs by the Trump administration. China is one of the countries hardest hit by the US-imposed tariffs, which have escalated the geopolitical tensions between the two economic superpowers, with effects spilling […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/china-to-record-a-dip-exports-on-us-tariffs/

data.title: Missouri to Suspend Personal Capital Gains Tax in 2025
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Missouri has received final approval for a bill that will suspend personal capital gains tax this year. This move positions Missouri to become the first U.S. state to eliminate capital gains tax on profits from the sale of stocks, real estate, and cryptocurrency assets.

The suspension of personal capital gains tax means that investors in Missouri will not be required to pay income tax on profits earned from these asset sales. If the state's revenue continues to grow, there is potential for the eventual elimination of corporate capital gains tax as well.

Capital gains refer to the profits made from selling assets such as stocks, cryptocurrencies, or real estate. The federal government imposes a long-term capital gains tax on assets held for more than a year, with rates lower than those for ordinary income.

data.title: Gate.io MemeBox launches Salamanca(DON), limited time share 3,770,739 DON airdrop
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Gate.io MemeBox has launched Salamanca (DON) and launched a limited-time airdrop event from 18:00 on May 8, 2025 to 18:00 on May 10, 2025 (UTC+8). During the event, you can get airdrop rewards by completing your first transaction (regardless of currency) or any Salamanca (DON) transaction on MemeBox, with a total prize pool of 3,770,739 DON.
MemeBox now supports popular public chains such as SOL, ETH, BNB Chain and Base. Users can use USDT in their spot accounts to directly purchase popular assets on the chain without manually changing chains, recharging or authorizing.

data.title: Two wallets suspected to be controlled by the same entity spent a total of approximately $14.54 million to purchase more than 7,293 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, two wallet addresses suspected to be controlled by the same entity spent a total of approximately US$14.54 million (including DAI and USDT) to purchase 7293.44 ETH at a unit price of US$1993.8.

data.title: SlowMist releases Pectra upgrade (EIP-7702) security reminder, reminding users to be vigilant about cross-chain replay and delegate call risks
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: With the official launch of the Ethereum Pectra upgrade (EIP-7702), SlowMist has issued a security reminder for users, wallet providers, developers and centralized exchanges. Users are advised to pay attention to private key protection, cross-chain contract code differences and delegated target risks; wallets should detect delegated chain information and prompt replay risks with chain ID 0; developers should avoid using tx.origin as a defense measure and ensure that the delegated target contract is compatible with mainstream tokens; CEXs need to track and check deposit transactions to prevent forged deposits.

data.title: Planet Evening News
DePINX invests $3 million to establish "DUCK Nest Fund" with DuckChain to accelerate DUCK application and ecological expansion
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On May 8, according to the official news of DuckChain, DePINX invested 3 million US dollars to establish a special fund "DUCK Nest Fund" with DuckChain, aiming to accelerate the application and ecological expansion of DUCK, and promote the deep integration and innovative practice of AI and on-chain finance.
This injection of long-term funds will provide strong support for DuckChain to build a more robust and sustainable ecological system and on-chain profit mechanism. Previously, DuckChain has received investment support from many top institutions such as OKX Ventures, dao5, Kenetic Capital, and Offchain Labs.

data.title: Robinhood Pivoting To RWA: Plans To Offer Tokenized US Securities In Europe
data.description:
Investment platform Robinhood is reportedly developing a blockchain-based platform aimed at enabling European investors to trade tokenized US securities. The move into the real-world asset (RWA) sector highlights the firm’s ongoing strategy of utilizing blockchain technology to streamline cross-border investing. (SOURCE) Robinhood’s Recent Brokerage Licence Acquisition In Lithuania A Boost To Its European Expansion Plans.
source: https://99bitcoins.com/news/altcoins/robinhood-pivoting-to-rwa-plans-to-offer-tokenized-us-securities-in-europe/

data.title: Binance Square launches Terminal feature to support real-time trading sharing and interaction
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Binance announced that Binance Square has launched a new feature Terminal, which supports viewing and sharing trading dynamics in real-time candlestick charts. The first batch of support includes tokens such as BTC. Users can display personal transactions in real time, view other people's operations, participate in community discussions, and compare trading performance with other traders, realizing an interactive experience while trading.

data.title: Strategy to Release 2025 Bitcoin Standard Model for Corporate Adoption
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Strategy is set to unveil its 2025 Bitcoin Standard Model, aimed at facilitating the integration of Bitcoin by traditional companies and enterprises. This initiative seeks to streamline the adoption process and provide a structured framework for businesses looking to incorporate Bitcoin into their operations.
